## BaseIdModal class

Component containing a modal expecting a required prop, named `modalId`<!-- -->. It reacts to `UserClickedOpenModal`<!-- -->, `UserClickedCloseModal` and `UserClickedOutOfModal` events, when their payload matches the component's 'modalId' prop, to handle its open/close state. The default slot offers the possibility to customise the modal content.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BaseIdModal extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation?](./x-components.baseidmodal.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | <i>(Optional)</i> Animation to use for opening/closing the modal. |
|  [isOpen](./x-components.baseidmodal.isopen.md) |  | boolean | Whether the modal is open or not. |
|  [modalId](./x-components.baseidmodal.modalid.md) |  | string | The modalId to use for the open and close event listeners. |
|  [openerElement?](./x-components.baseidmodal.openerelement.md) |  | HTMLElement | <i>(Optional)</i> The element that opened the modal. |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [closeModal(payload)](./x-components.baseidmodal.closemodal.md) |  | Closes the modal. |
|  [emitClickOutOfModal(event)](./x-components.baseidmodal.emitclickoutofmodal.md) |  | Emits a [XEventsTypes.UserClickedOutOfModal](./x-components.xeventstypes.userclickedoutofmodal.md) event unless the passed event target is the button that opened the modal. |
|  [openModal(modalId, metadata)](./x-components.baseidmodal.openmodal.md) |  | Opens the modal. |
